name: Lampang superhighway retail strip
notes: City-side retail and supermarket strip covering Central, Big C, Lotus's, Makro, airport frontage, and repeat urban trips suited to destination charging.

name: Lampang old city and Wang River activity band
notes: Old town, riverfront, hospital, bus/rail access, and mixed civic-commercial demand that supports compact urban charging more than pure highway charging.

name: Hang Chat - Chiang Mai gateway connector
notes: Gateway corridor toward Chiang Mai along Route 11 where stopover demand should sit between regional travel and near-city community activity.

name: Ko Kha Route 1 city-south connector
notes: Southwest city approach combining Route 1 corridor traffic with Ko Kha fringe demand and temple/tourism spill-in that is still accessible from the main road.

name: Mae Moh industrial and workforce connector
notes: Eastern workforce and industrial movement tied to Mae Moh; suitable for corridor-style charging if anchored by reliable roadside amenities.
